Game: The Great Battle IV 1994-12-17T00:00:00-08:00 The Great Battle IV is an Action game, developed by Sun L and published by Banpresto, which was released in Japan in 1994. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/a1dd5746-5aef-47da-a2b4-59e141fb54f9.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/e871721c-d201-4b84-a7fc-88e5039b57da.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/e0b390af-062e-4b03-9cb1-e6f478bf4eee.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/b8ede1f7-1329-4a3c-8e70-e86e9107519c.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/ce62667f-7523-4270-a36e-7a96c4bf7110.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/1059eca7-df5a-4dc8-9231-c00d24fb0a55.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/c62b904c-983c-4fa8-a0ed-bbc9e856cac7.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/fabd7e0d-27f4-4dbe-ad7a-a160c3e0fa1f.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/e4ed1d1e-4ca1-4b1b-9799-88a990cc44ae.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/9575becf-9ea5-4e83-805b-f9a4a415ef3f.png Action; Platform Sun L Banpresto
